feedback_incorporated: Year 2 feedback patterns (40% Enquiry, 53% Practice, 62% Self-Leadership)
Harsh assessment recommendations: personal experience focus
Team Apollo specificity requirement: names, dates, situations
Brutal honesty about failures and progress

completion_estimate.notes: Strong self-reflection throughout, specific team situations, honest assessment. Potential for 90%+ with optional v03 enhancements (psychometric connections, more team feedback quotes, deeper theoretical integration).

personal_experience_focus.details: Transformed from placeholder to 1,247 words of deep personal reflection with consistent 'I' statements about feelings, struggles, and behavioral patterns

specific_team_situations.details: Added specific interactions with Sam (delegation challenges), David (observed perfectionism), Pranav (values support), Harry (communication lesson) with dates

honest_self_assessment.details: Acknowledged 7% achievement on primary goal, identified root causes (fear of rejection, perfectionism), took full responsibility with detailed plans vs reality table

values_ethics_dimension.details: Included ethical decision example (declined £15K crypto project), demonstrated willingness to pay for values, team support for ethical stance

eliminated_patterns: Generic examples without specific team context

key_achievements: Identified 'perfectionism paralysis' pattern with specific example
Connected Year 2 feedback patterns to Year 3 behavior
Included ethical decision with real revenue cost (£15,000)
Created detailed plans vs reality comparison table
Recognized gap between self-awareness and behavior change
optional_v03_enhancements: Add psychometric assessment connections (INTJ, Strengths, Motivation)
Strengthen theoretical framework integration (Gibb's, Dweck, Schön)
Add more quantitative evidence and metrics

mission_status.mission: Create version v02 with major improvements
